name: Pushing Kids Off Bikes
developer: Kie James Yavorsky (Game Developer), Yavo (Kie Christopher Yavorsky) (Game Developer), Daniel Haddock (Artist), Al Lang (Voice Actor)
short_description: You'll run around 10, 3D levels, as a hand drawn 2D Chinchilla gathering seeds, growing pumpkins, and pushing kids off bikes! Your chinchilla Bazooka will make sure those kids don't get in your way. You'll look for happiness orbs to jump and seeds to fire your Bazooka, in this arcade farming game!
detailed_description:
Wanna Push Kids Off Bikes? Your A 2D Chinchilla In A 3D World. Push Kids Off Bikes or use your Bazooka to Farm Your Pumpkins And Reach The Next New Level!

Progress through 10 levels gathering and farming pumpkins! As Kids get out of School, they'll chaise you down. Avoid them, or fight them, the choice is in your chinchilla hands. Yellow Sunshine orbs give you the happiness to jump, blue water orbs are what plants crave, and finding seeds to grow your pumpkins as you push kids off bikes will make you the happiest chinchilla in the world!

This Game Was Made By A Father And Son Team With A Pet Chinchilla.

reviews.review_text:
This game is pretty fun. Gives you the old school vibes. 

Keeping in mind, this was made by a dad and his son (probably super young) and is their first project, they did well. I hope they continue down this road and make more games!
